title: primula elatior subsp. canescens
intro: Primula elatior subsp. canescens, also known as the cowslip or mountain primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant is also believed to have a range of health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, and improving sleep quality. Primula elatior subsp. canescens can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
